case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. TERRELYN EVANS ET AL

docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JUN-10-2015 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT TERRELYN EVANS' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT EVANS, TERRELYN DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT EVANS, TERRELYN ORDER SETTING HEARING FOR JUN-10-2015 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT EVANS, TERRELYN
MODIFICATION TO THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT EVANS, TERRELYN
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
FEES NOT PAID. STIPULATION OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT OF TERRELYN EVANS FILED ON 3/18/15 IS STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING FEE WAIVER FILED ON 6/10/15. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JAN-29-2025.
